'''Kaastoag''' were scavenging [[Biot|creatures]] with stingers and tentacles used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to clean [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] waste from the floors of their mess halls. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], several were present in the [[High Chew|mess]] aboard the [[vua'spar interdictor]] ''[[Sunulok]]'' shortly before the commencement of the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Battle Plan Coruscant]]<ref name="SbS" /> in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> where they fought over [[yanskac]] remains cast to the floor by Yuuzhan Vong [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] while he consumed its meat.<ref name="SbS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kaastoag first appeared in the [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' by [[Troy Denning]].<ref name="SbS" />
